Uses of Class
org.key_project.logic.Namespace

Packages that use Namespace
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.control.instantiation_model
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.loader
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt
This package contains the "language data types" (LDTs) of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser
This package contains the parser for .key and .proof files.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io
Classes related to loading and saving proof files.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings
 
org.key_project.logic
 
org.key_project.prover.rules

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java with parameters of type Namespace
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JP2KeYConverter
    JavaService.getConverter(Namespace<SchemaVariable> schemaVariables)
    return the associated converter object
    JavaBlock
    JavaService.readBlock(String block, JPContext context, Namespace<SchemaVariable> allowSchemaJava)
    parses a given JavaBlock using the context to determine the right references
    JavaBlock
    JavaService.readBlockWithEmptyContext(String block, @Nullable Namespace<SchemaVariable> allowSchemaJava)
    parses a given JavaBlock using the context to determine the right references using an empty context
    JavaBlock
    JavaService.readBlockWithProgramVariables(Namespace<IProgramVariable> variables, String s, Namespace<SchemaVariable> allowSchemaJava)
    parses a given JavaBlock using a namespace to determine the right references using an empty context.

  • Uses of Namespace in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule that return Namespace
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Namespace<@NonNull Function>
    TacletApp.extendedFunctionNameSpace(Namespace<@NonNull Function> func_ns)
    create a new function namespace by adding all newly instantiated skolem symbols to a new namespace.
    Namespace<@NonNull QuantifiableVariable>
    TacletApp.extendVarNamespaceForSV(Namespace<@NonNull QuantifiableVariable> var_ns, SchemaVariable sv)
    creates a new variable namespace by adding names of the instantiations of the schema variables in the context of the given schema variable and (if the TacletApp's prefix has the context flag set) by adding names of the logic variables of the context.
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule with parameters of type Namespace
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Namespace<@NonNull Function>
    TacletApp.extendedFunctionNameSpace(Namespace<@NonNull Function> func_ns)
    create a new function namespace by adding all newly instantiated skolem symbols to a new namespace.
    Namespace<@NonNull QuantifiableVariable>
    TacletApp.extendVarNamespaceForSV(Namespace<@NonNull QuantifiableVariable> var_ns, SchemaVariable sv)
    creates a new variable namespace by adding names of the instantiations of the schema variables in the context of the given schema variable and (if the TacletApp's prefix has the context flag set) by adding names of the logic variables of the context.
